steps.t: Grethron believes that Annaethel's son may yet live. You should look for signs of Mellanion in Caranost, in central Cardolan.
The blanket you found is definitely of Elven weave. Could it have belonged to the missing Elf-child? You should continue to look for signs of Mellanio…
The hobby horse looks like it's been chewed on, but hopefully its owner has not been! Keep looking for signs of Mellanion in Caranost, in central Card…
Mellanion managed to hide from his captors, but he needs help making his escape. He wants you to ignite the crate of black powder he spotted in the to…
With the Orcs distracted, Mellanion was able to make his escape! You should check to be sure he made it back to Sírlond. Sírlond is in central Cardola…
Grethron wants you to give the hobby horse back to Mellanion. Mellanion is in Sírlond, thanks to you.
